title: Christ's Incarnation.
content:
Christ took our nature on Him, not that He
    'Bove all things loved it for the purity:
    No, but He dress'd Him with our human trim,
    Because our flesh stood most in need of Him.
meaning:
"Christ's Incarnation." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
